name: .github
description: Org-wide community health files (issue/PR templates, sponsor, profile)

name: auth
description: togo base auth: JWT + RBAC + multi-guard, Supabase/GoTrue first-class, OAuth/Firebase/WorkOS as plugins

name: auth-dev
description: Developer login for togo auth (dev-only)

name: auth-firebase
description: Firebase Authentication driver for togo auth

name: auth-oauth
description: OAuth2 social login for togo auth

name: auth-session-redis
description: Redis session store for togo auth

name: auth-workos
description: WorkOS SSO/SAML driver for togo auth

name: cache
description: togo cache provider plugin

name: cache-redis
description: Redis driver for togo cache

name: cli
description: The togo CLI — Laravel-artisan-like generators, codegen, plugins, MCP, deploy

name: create-togo-app
description: Project template for togo, rendered by `togo new`

name: dashboard
description: togo dashboard + auth UI (depends on auth)

name: db
description: togo database stack — the togo-postgres image (ParadeDB: pg_search + pgvector + pg_analytics, plus pg_cron + pg_partman) and the batteries-included compose.

name: db-supabase
description: Postgres/Supabase driver for togo ORM

name: faker
description: togo faker: fake data for factories/seeders

name: i18n
description: togo i18n provider plugin

name: log
description: togo logging: levels, text/json, file output

name: mail
description: togo mail: SMTP + driver plugins (SES/Resend)

name: mail-resend
description: Resend driver for togo mail

name: mcp
description: MCP server exposing togo generators to AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor, …)

name: notifications
description: togo notifications: channels (mail/broadcast/db) + push plugins

name: notifications-onesignal
description: OneSignal push channel for togo notifications

name: orm
description: togo ORM: driver-agnostic query builder (SQLi-validated)

name: plugin-auth-supabase
description: togo plugin: Supabase (GoTrue) JWT auth — /auth/me + bearer middleware

name: plugin-template
description: Starter template for togo plugins

name: queue
description: togo queue provider plugin

name: realtime
description: togo realtime provider plugin

name: realtime-ws
description: WebSocket realtime transport for togo

name: search
description: togo search: ParadeDB default + ES/OpenSearch plugins

name: search-elasticsearch
description: Elasticsearch/OpenSearch driver for togo search

name: storage
description: togo storage provider plugin

name: storage-supabase
description: Supabase Storage driver for togo

name: supabase
description: togo Supabase integration: custom image (ParadeDB/pgvector/pg_partman) + stack

name: testing
description: togo test harness (HTTP + assertions + sqlite)

name: to-go.dev
description: to-go.dev — the togo framework website: landing, docs, install.sh/update.sh.

name: togo
description: Go, the artisan way — microkernel of the togo framework (Go + sqlc + Atlas + GraphQL/OpenAPI + Next.js)

name: ui
description: togo UI kit — prism-style admin + auth components (Storybook). RTL-ready, dark-first.

name: validation
description: togo request validation (Laravel-style rules)

name: worker
description: togo worker: supervised multi-threaded worker pools
